## AgentSchema variable

Zod schema for a persisted agent entity.

**Signature:**

```typescript

	{
		id: z.ZodString

		lastName: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>
		preferredName: z.ZodOptional<z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'Name'>>
		suffix: z.ZodOptional<
			z.ZodEnum<['Jr', 'Sr', 'II', 'III', 'IV', 'V', 'MD', 'PhD', 'Esq']>
		>
		birthDate: z.ZodBranded<z.ZodString, 'DateOnlyISO'>
	},
```
